title: cotula filicula
intro: Cotula filicula, also known as Bitter Buttons or Cotula, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to Australia, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its bitter and astringent properties, which have been shown to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cotula filicula include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Cotula filicula can be made into a decoction or infusion, or used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
